question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: getHooks(HooksRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user supply any arbitrary ownerId in HooksRequest to retrieve Hook records belonging to another account, given that getHooks() performs no caller-identity check before invoking hookRepository.findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween(), causing unauthorized disclosure of financial hook state that could be used to front-run or drain funds?
